rationale: Review 1 identifies the decisive generality defect confirmed in the diff: AlgPoints is restricted to k-points (A →ₐ[k] k) instead of the functor of points (A →ₐ[k] R), and flags the bundling anti-pattern that limits reuse. Review 2's findings address correctness and cleanliness but say nothing about generality, so acting on it leaves these restrictions in place.
